name: @haive/worker
description: BullMQ workers, step engine, sandbox manager and CLI adapters for Haive

scripts.smoke:all: pnpm smoke:onboarding && pnpm smoke:onboarding-full && pnpm smoke:drupal7 && pnpm smoke:workflow && pnpm smoke:workflow-commit && pnpm smoke:env-replicate && pnpm smoke:env-replicate-wrap && pnpm smoke:sub-agent && pnpm smoke:container-cleanup && pnpm smoke:worker-kill-resume && pnpm smoke:dag && pnpm smoke:dag-conflict && pnpm smoke:dag-auto-resolve && pnpm smoke:dag-review && pnpm smoke:dag-escalation && pnpm smoke:fix-loop
scripts.smoke:ci: pnpm smoke:onboarding && pnpm smoke:onboarding-full && pnpm smoke:drupal7 && pnpm smoke:workflow && pnpm smoke:workflow-commit && pnpm smoke:env-replicate && pnpm smoke:env-replicate-wrap && pnpm smoke:container-cleanup && pnpm smoke:worker-kill-resume && pnpm smoke:dag && pnpm smoke:dag-conflict && pnpm smoke:dag-auto-resolve && pnpm smoke:dag-review && pnpm smoke:dag-escalation && pnpm smoke:fix-loop
